name: rbcL_Angiosperms_eudicots
description: Plastid rbcL (RuBisCO large subunit, ~1400 bp; CBOL plant barcode core region typically 600-700 bp window) for plant group Angiosperms_eudicots. Eudicotyledonous flowering plants — bulk of land flora. Slow-evolving but excellent family/genus resolution. Allow moderate mismatch.
